intro: Over the past three weeks, ZCyberNews has published 27 articles on the tag ai, spanning from April 8 to April 29, 2026. The most frequently covered threat actor is Pushpaganda, while the affected sectors include technology, critical infrastructure, enterprise software, finance, and financial services. The coverage reflects a global impact, with reports also highlighting the United States, Asia, Australia, and Canada. The severity mix comprises 11 informational, 11 high, 1 critical, and 4 medium articles, providing a broad view of developments in this space.
